title: Pipeline Configuration Matrix
description: Defines the ordered set of pipeline steps, their artifact contracts, and execution commands for the MCP documentation generation pipeline.
$comment: Migration path (item #638): the per-step 'additionalProperties: false' is intentional — it makes StepRegistry drift detection fail loudly when a step entry gains an unexpected field. When a future schema version adds a new field, do NOT relax that flag. Instead: (1) bump each entry's 'schemaVersion' (e.g. '1.0' -> '1.1'), (2) add the new field under 'properties', and (3) add it to 'required' only if every entry must supply it (otherwise leave it optional). This keeps forward changes explicit and reviewable.

id.description: Unique integer identifier matching the step's Id property in the C# registry.

name.description: Human-readable step name matching the step's Name property in the C# registry.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the pipeline.config.json schema this entry conforms to (e.g. '1.0').

scope.description: Execution scope: 'global' runs once per pipeline invocation; 'namespace' runs once per target namespace.

dependencies.description: Step IDs that must complete successfully before this step can run.

inputArtifacts.description: Glob patterns or paths describing files this step reads. Use '{namespace}' as a placeholder for per-namespace paths.

outputArtifacts.description: Glob patterns or paths describing files this step produces. Use '{namespace}' as a placeholder for per-namespace paths.

outputMultiplicity.description: How many output units this step produces: 'single' (once globally), 'per-tool' (one per MCP tool), or 'per-namespace' (one per target namespace).

localCommand.description: Command to run this step in a local development environment. Use '<namespace>' as a placeholder for the target namespace.

ciCommand.description: Command to run this step in CI. Use '<namespace>' as a placeholder for the target namespace.
